name: CorMedix Inc.
business: CorMedix is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapeutic products for life-threatening diseases and conditions. Its primary focus is commercializing DefenCath (taurolidine and heparin), an FDA-approved antimicrobial catheter lock solution indicated to reduce the incidence of catheter-related bloodstream infections in adult hemodialysis patients. Following the acquisition of Melinta in August 2025, the company also markets a portfolio of hospital- and clinic-focused infectious disease products.

exposures.sentence: Our primary focus has been commercializing DefenCath (taurolidine and heparin), in the U.S., which we launched in 2024 in the hemodialysis setting.

In July 2023, Melinta signed a development contract with BARDA to advance two antibiotics currently FDA-approved for adults, BAXDELA (delafloxacin) and VABOMERE (meropenem and vaborbactam), for use in pediatrics and to advance BAXDELA for use in biodefense indications.
Risks relating to cybersecurity and data privacy could create additional liabilities for us.

catalysts.event: DefenCath TDAPA transition to post-TDAPA add-on payment phase
catalysts.sentence: On July 1, 2026, DefenCath's TDAPA reimbursement transitions into a three-year, post-TDAPA Add-On Payment phase, the calculation of which is determined and published by CMS and will be $2.37 for the third and fourth quarters of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of REZZAYO Phase III study
catalysts.sentence: The completion of the Phase III study for REZZAYO is expected in 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of REZZAYO for prophylaxis indication (potential milestone payment)
catalysts.sentence: Upon the issuance of the FDA marketing approval of REZZAYO (or any product that contains the active ingredient rezafungin), for the prevention or prophylaxis of invasive fungal infections in adult patients undergoing allogeneic stem cell blood and marrow transplant or the regulatory equivalent on or prior to June 30, 2029, we shall pay... to the former Melinta equity holders the following payments...
